eligibility.rule: FIDE-identified, official rating at least 2200, and 20 games in the latest 12 months.

tournament_predictor.draw_model: Model draw likelihood; Elo uses the historical football draw rate scaled by matchup closeness.
tournament_predictor.tie_break: Points, simulated goal difference, then current model strength.
tournament_predictor.strengths: Fixed at the generation-time rating state; completed results change both the table and the next refresh's ratings.
tournament_predictor.knockout_draw: Published ties are preserved. If a later cup draw is not published, surviving teams are uniformly re-drawn in each simulation; known byes are preserved. Draw constraints are not invented.
tournament_predictor.availability_rule: Title probabilities are withheld until a public knockout field exists.

competitions.label: Chennai Grand Masters 2026
competitions.availability: All unplayed pairings are inferred from the published round-robin field; future colours are treated as neutral until published.
competitions.tie_break: Points, simulated win-loss differential, then generation-time model strength; event-specific official tie-breaks are not available in the broadcast feed.
